title: Snappy Polish Lime Dinner
description: A simple and flavorful Polish-inspired dinner featuring a snappy, jammy lime dish made with kombu-cold-extract.

ingredients.name: Kombu
ingredients.notes: cold-extract only, discard the sheets after use

instructions: Peel the lime, removing any blemishes or green parts. Cut the lime into thin slices.
Soak the lime slices in cold kombu extract for at least 2 hours. This will help to retain the lime's natural flavor and texture.
In a separate pan, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the beetroot slices to the pan and cook for 5-7 minutes on each side, until tender and slightly caramelized.
Season the beetroot with salt and black pepper to taste.
Mix the cold-extracted lime slices with the cooked beetroot, cottage cheese, and chopped fresh parsley.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed. Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
